name: warehousegame
description: The Ripple Effect — a real-time asymmetric co-op warehouse training simulator

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
